ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-1234567 Has Shipped – Delivery Expected 2026-04-10
ham.body:
Hi there,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! We’re excited to let you know that your order #123-4567890-1234567 has shipped and is on its way.

Order Summary:
• Item: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
• Quantity: 1
• Order Total: $79.99

Tracking Information:
• Carrier: Amazon Logistics
• Tracking Number: 1Z9999999999999999
• Estimated Delivery: 2026-04-10

You can check the status of your delivery by logging into your Amazon account.

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to contact our customer service team.

Thank you for choosing Amazon. We hope you enjoy your new headphones!

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Unpaid Delivery Fee for Your Recent FedEx Shipment
spam.body:
Dear FedEx Customer,

Our records indicate that your recent shipment with FedEx/DHL was marked as "Missed Delivery" and a handling fee of $89.99 is now pending. To avoid further delays and additional charges, please confirm your payment within the next 48 hours.

To resolve this issue, click <URL> to enter the secure payment portal and verify your shipping details.

If you believe this notice is in error, please reply to this email with your tracking number so we can investigate.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Support
